name: kanbanqube
description: Local-first Kanban board backed by normal files
author: Mathias Conradt

scripts.test: npm run check:registry && node --check server.js && node --check app.js && find config controllers middleware models routes services utils -name '*.js' -exec node --check {} \; && node --check --input-type=module < public/app.js
scripts.check:registry: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const lock=fs.readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf8'); if(/repox|jfrog/i.test(lock)){ console.error('package-lock.json must use public npm registry URLs, not local Repox/JFrog URLs.'); process.exit(1); }"
